problem_title: Bicycle Shop Database Schema with SQLAlchemy
question: Write code to create a database schema for an online bicycle shop that sells bicycles as well as their spare parts and accessories. Use SQAlchemy library to communicate with the database. The code should cover opening and closing of a new connection to the database, creation of necessary tables and their relations, common operations on items in the tables such as addition, deletion, updates, filtered selection and search.

import sqlalchemy
from sqlalchemy import create_engine, Column, Integer, String, Float, ForeignKey, Boolean
from sqlalchemy.orm import sessionmaker, relationship
from sqlalchemy.ext.declarative import declarative_base

Base = declarative_base()

class Bicycle(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'bicycles'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String)
    brand = Column(String)
    model = Column(String)
    description = Column(String)
    price = Column(Float)
    quantity_in_stock = Column(Integer)
    category = Column(String)  # e.g., "Mountain", "Road", "Hybrid"
    frame_material = Column(String)
    wheel_size = Column(Integer)
    color = Column(String)
    weight_kg = Column(Float)

    order_items = relationship("OrderItem", back_populates="bicycle")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Bicycle(name='{self.name}', brand='{self.brand}', model='{self.model}', price={self.price})>"


class SparePart(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'spare_parts'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String)
    description = Column(String)
    price = Column(Float)
    quantity_in_stock = Column(Integer)
    category = Column(String)  # e.g., "Brakes", "Gears", "Tires"
    brand = Column(String)
    model = Column(String)
    compatible_bicycles = Column(String) # Store compatible bicycle models as comma-separated string

    order_items = relationship("OrderItem", back_populates="spare_part")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<SparePart(name='{self.name}', category='{self.category}', price={self.price})>"


class Accessory(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'accessories'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String)
    description = Column(String)
    price = Column(Float)
    quantity_in_stock = Column(Integer)
    category = Column(String)  # e.g., "Helmets", "Lights", "Locks"
    brand = Column(String)
    model = Column(String)
    size = Column(String, nullable=True) # e.g., "S", "M", "L" for helmets

    order_items = relationship("OrderItem", back_populates="accessory")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Accessory(name='{self.name}', category='{self.category}', price={self.price})>"


class Customer(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'customers'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    first_name = Column(String)
    last_name = Column(String)
    email = Column(String, unique=True)
    phone_number = Column(String)
    address = Column(String)

    orders = relationship("Order", back_populates="customer")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Customer(first_name='{self.first_name}', last_name='{self.last_name}', email='{self.email}')>"


class Order(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'orders'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    customer_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('customers.id'))
    order_date = Column(sqlalchemy.DateTime, default=sqlalchemy.func.now())
    total_amount = Column(Float)
    shipping_address = Column(String)
    order_status = Column(String, default="Pending") # e.g., "Pending", "Shipped", "Delivered", "Cancelled"

    customer = relationship("Customer", back_populates="orders")
    order_items = relationship("OrderItem", back_populates="order")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Order(id={self.id}, customer_id={self.customer_id}, order_date={self.order_date})>"


class OrderItem(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'order_items'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    order_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('orders.id'))
    bicycle_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('bicycles.id'), nullable=True)
    spare_part_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('spare_parts.id'), nullable=True)
    accessory_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('accessories.id'), nullable=True)
    quantity = Column(Integer)
    item_price = Column(Float) # Price at the time of order

    order = relationship("Order", back_populates="order_items")
    bicycle = relationship("Bicycle", back_populates="order_items")
    spare_part = relationship("SparePart", back_populates="order_items")
    accessory = relationship("Accessory", back_populates="order_items")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<OrderItem(order_id={self.order_id}, quantity={self.quantity})>"


def create_db_engine(db_url):
    engine = create_engine(db_url)
    return engine

def create_tables(engine):
    Base.metadata.create_all(engine)

def open_db_session(engine):
    Session = sessionmaker(bind=engine)
    return Session()

def close_db_session(session):
    session.close()

def add_bicycle(session, name, brand, model, description, price, quantity_in_stock, category, frame_material, wheel_size, color, weight_kg):

    if not order:
        return None

    if bicycle_id:
        item = get_bicycle_by_id(session, bicycle_id)
    elif spare_part_id:
        item = get_spare_part_by_id(session, spare_part_id)
    elif accessory_id:
        item = get_accessory_by_id(session, accessory_id)
    else:
        return None

    if not item:

        item_price = item.price

    order_item = OrderItem(order_id=order_id, bicycle_id=bicycle_id, spare_part_id=spare_part_id, accessory_id=accessory_id, quantity=quantity, item_price=item_price)

    if order_item:
        order = get_order_by_id(session, order_item.order_id)
        if order:
            # Recalculate total amount
            order.total_amount -= (order_item.quantity * order_item.item_price)
            order_item.quantity = new_quantity
            order.total_amount += (order_item.quantity * order_item.item_price)
            session.commit()
            return True
    return False

def delete_order_item(session, order_item_id):
    order_item = get_order_item_by_id(session, order_item_id)
    if order_item:
        order = get_order_by_id(session, order_item.order_id)
        if order:
            order.total_amount -= (order_item.quantity * order_item.item_price)
            session.delete(order_item)
            session.commit()
            return True
    return False

import sqlalchemy
from sqlalchemy import create_engine, Column, Integer, String, Float, ForeignKey, Boolean
from sqlalchemy.orm import sessionmaker, relationship
from sqlalchemy.ext.declarative import declarative_base

Base = declarative_base()

class Bicycle(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'bicycles'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String)
    brand = Column(String)
    model = Column(String)
    description = Column(String)
    price = Column(Float)
    quantity_in_stock = Column(Integer)
    category = Column(String)  # e.g., "Mountain", "Road", "Hybrid"
    frame_material = Column(String)
    wheel_size = Column(Integer)
    color = Column(String)
    weight_kg = Column(Float)

    order_items = relationship("OrderItem", back_populates="bicycle")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Bicycle(name='{self.name}', brand='{self.brand}', model='{self.model}', price={self.price})>"


class SparePart(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'spare_parts'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String)
    description = Column(String)
    price = Column(Float)
    quantity_in_stock = Column(Integer)
    category = Column(String)  # e.g., "Brakes", "Gears", "Tires"
    brand = Column(String)
    model = Column(String)
    compatible_bicycles = Column(String) # Store compatible bicycle models as comma-separated string

    order_items = relationship("OrderItem", back_populates="spare_part")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<SparePart(name='{self.name}', category='{self.category}', price={self.price})>"


class Accessory(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'accessories'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String)
    description = Column(String)
    price = Column(Float)
    quantity_in_stock = Column(Integer)
    category = Column(String)  # e.g., "Helmets", "Lights", "Locks"
    brand = Column(String)
    model = Column(String)
    size = Column(String, nullable=True) # e.g., "S", "M", "L" for helmets

    order_items = relationship("OrderItem", back_populates="accessory")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Accessory(name='{self.name}', category='{self.category}', price={self.price})>"


class Customer(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'customers'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    first_name = Column(String)
    last_name = Column(String)
    email = Column(String, unique=True)
    phone_number = Column(String)
    address = Column(String)

    orders = relationship("Order", back_populates="customer")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Customer(first_name='{self.first_name}', last_name='{self.last_name}', email='{self.email}')>"


class Order(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'orders'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    customer_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('customers.id'))
    order_date = Column(sqlalchemy.DateTime, default=sqlalchemy.func.now())
    total_amount = Column(Float)
    shipping_address = Column(String)
    order_status = Column(String, default="Pending") # e.g., "Pending", "Shipped", "Delivered", "Cancelled"

    customer = relationship("Customer", back_populates="orders")
    order_items = relationship("OrderItem", back_populates="order")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Order(id={self.id}, customer_id={self.customer_id}, order_date={self.order_date})>"


class OrderItem(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'order_items'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    order_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('orders.id'))
    bicycle_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('bicycles.id'), nullable=True)
    spare_part_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('spare_parts.id'), nullable=True)
    accessory_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('accessories.id'), nullable=True)
    quantity = Column(Integer)
    item_price = Column(Float) # Price at the time of order

    order = relationship("Order", back_populates="order_items")
    bicycle = relationship("Bicycle", back_populates="order_items")
    spare_part = relationship("SparePart", back_populates="order_items")
    accessory = relationship("Accessory", back_populates="order_items")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<OrderItem(order_id={self.order_id}, quantity={self.quantity})>"


def create_db_engine(db_url):
    engine = create_engine(db_url)
    return engine

def create_tables(engine):
    Base.metadata.create_all(engine)

def open_db_session(engine):
    Session = sessionmaker(bind=engine)
    return Session()

def close_db_session(session):
    session.close()

import sqlalchemy
from sqlalchemy import create_engine, Column, Integer, String, Float, ForeignKey, Boolean
from sqlalchemy.orm import sessionmaker, relationship
from sqlalchemy.ext.declarative import declarative_base

Base = declarative_base()

class Bicycle(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'bicycles'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String)
    brand = Column(String)

def add_order(session, customer_id, shipping_address):

def add_order_item(session, order_id, bicycle_id=None, spare_part_id=None, accessory_id=None, quantity=1, item_price=None):
    order = get_order_by_id(session, order_id)
    if not order:
        return None

    if bicycle_id:
        item = get_bicycle_by_id(session, bicycle_id)
    elif spare_part_id:
        item = get_spare_part_by_id(session, spare_part_id)
    elif accessory_id:
        item = get_accessory_by_id(session, accessory_id)
    else:
        return None

    if not item:
        return None

    if item_price is None:
        item_price = item.price

    order_item = OrderItem(order_id=order_id, bicycle_id=bicycle_id, spare_part_id=spare_part_id, accessory_id=accessory_id, quantity=quantity, item_price=item_price)
    session.add(order_item)

    # Update total amount of the order
    order.total_amount = (order.total_amount or 0) + (quantity * item_price)
    session.commit()
    return order_item

def get_order_item_by_id(session, order_item_id):
    return session.query(OrderItem).filter(OrderItem.id == order_item_id).first()

def update_order_item_quantity(session, order_item_id, new_quantity):
    order_item = get_order_item_by_id(session, order_item_id)
    if order_item:
        order = get_order_by_id(session, order_item.order_id)
        if order:
            # Recalculate total amount
            order.total_amount -= (order_item.quantity * order_item.item_price)
            order_item.quantity = new_quantity
            order.total_amount += (order_item.quantity * order_item.item_price)
            session.commit()
            return True
    return False

def delete_order_item(session, order_item_id):
    order_item = get_order_item_by_id(session, order_item_id)
    if order_item:
        order = get_order_by_id(session, order_item.order_id)
        if order:
            order.total_amount -= (order_item.quantity * order_item.item_price)
            session.delete(order_item)
            session.commit()
            return True
    return False

if __name__ == '__main__':
    db_url = 'sqlite:///./bicycle_shop.db'  # Use an in-memory SQLite database for testing
    engine = create_db_engine(db_url)
    create_tables(engine)

    session = open_db_session(engine)

    # Example Usage
    try:
        # Add a bicycle
        bicycle1 = add_bicycle(session, name="Mountain Bike", brand="Trek", model="X-Caliber 8", description="Great mountain bike", price=899.99, quantity_in_stock=10, category="Mountain", frame_material="Aluminum", wheel_size=29, color="Black", weight_kg=13.5)
        print(f"Added bicycle: {bicycle1}")

        # Add a spare part
        spare_part1 = add_spare_part(session, name="Brake Pads", description="High-performance brake pads", price=25.00, quantity_in_stock=50, category="Brakes", brand="Shimano", model="BR-MT200", compatible_bicycles="Trek X-Caliber 8, Giant Talon 2")
        print(f"Added spare part: {spare_part1}")

        # Add an accessory
        accessory1 = add_accessory(session, name="Helmet", description="Adult cycling helmet", price=49.99, quantity_in_stock=20, category="Helmets", brand="Giro", model="Foray", size="M")
        print(f"Added accessory: {accessory1}")

        # Add a customer
        customer1 = add_customer(session, first_name="John", last_name="Doe", email="john.doe@example.com", phone_number="555-123-4567", address="123 Main St")
        print(f"Added customer: {customer1}")

        # Add an order
        order1 = add_order(session, customer_id=customer1.id, shipping_address="123 Main St")
        print(f"Added order: {order1}")

        # Add order items
        order_item1 = add_order_item(session, order_id=order1.id, bicycle_id=bicycle1.id, quantity=1)
        print(f"Added order item (bicycle): {order_item1}")

        order_item2 = add_order_item(session, order_id=order1.id, accessory_id=accessory1.id, quantity=2)
        print(f"Added order item (accessory): {order_item2}")

        # Update order status
        update_order_status(session, order1.id, "Shipped")
        print(f"Updated order status to Shipped")

        # Search for bicycles
        search_results = search_bicycles(session, "Mountain")
        print(f"Search results for 'Mountain': {search_results}")

    except Exception as e:
        print(f"An error occurred: {e}")
        session.rollback()
    finally:
        close_db_session(session)

import sqlalchemy
from sqlalchemy import create_engine, Column, Integer, String, Float, ForeignKey, Boolean
from sqlalchemy.orm import sessionmaker, relationship
from sqlalchemy.ext.declarative import declarative_base

Base = declarative_base()

class Bicycle(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'bicycles'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String)
    brand = Column(String)
    model = Column(String)
    description = Column(String)
    price = Column(Float)
    quantity_in_stock = Column(Integer)
    category = Column(String)  # e.g., "Mountain", "Road", "Hybrid"
    frame_material = Column(String)
    wheel_size = Column(Integer)
    color = Column(String)
    weight_kg = Column(Float)

    order_items = relationship("OrderItem", back_populates="bicycle")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Bicycle(name='{self.name}', brand='{self.brand}', model='{self.model}', price={self.price})>"


class SparePart(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'spare_parts'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String)
    description = Column(String)
    price = Column(Float)
    quantity_in_stock = Column(Integer)
    category = Column(String)  # e.g., "Brakes", "Gears", "Tires"
    brand = Column(String)
    model = Column(String)
    compatible_bicycles = Column(String) # Store compatible bicycle models as comma-separated string

    order_items = relationship("OrderItem", back_populates="spare_part")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<SparePart(name='{self.name}', category='{self.category}', price={self.price})>"


class Accessory(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'accessories'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String)
    description = Column(String)
    price = Column(Float)
    quantity_in_stock = Column(Integer)
    category = Column(String)  # e.g., "Helmets", "Lights", "Locks"
    brand = Column(String)
    model = Column(String)
    size = Column(String, nullable=True) # e.g., "S", "M", "L" for helmets

    order_items = relationship("OrderItem", back_populates="accessory")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Accessory(name='{self.name}', category='{self.category}', price={self.price})>"


class Customer(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'customers'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    first_name = Column(String)
    last_name = Column(String)
    email = Column(String, unique=True)
    phone_number = Column(String)
    address = Column(String)

    orders = relationship("Order", back_populates="customer")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Customer(first_name='{self.first_name}', last_name='{self.last_name}', email='{self.email}')>"


class Order(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'orders'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    customer_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('customers.id'))
    order_date = Column(sqlalchemy.DateTime, default=sqlalchemy.func.now())
    total_amount = Column(Float)
    shipping_address = Column(String)
    order_status = Column(String, default="Pending") # e.g., "Pending", "Shipped", "Delivered", "Cancelled"

    customer = relationship("Customer", back_populates="orders")
    order_items = relationship("OrderItem", back_populates="order")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Order(id={self.id}, customer_id={self.customer_id}, order_date={self.order_date})>"


class OrderItem(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'order_items'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    order_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('orders.id'))
    bicycle_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('bicycles.id'), nullable=True)
    spare_part_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('spare_parts.id'), nullable=True)
    accessory_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('accessories.id'), nullable=True)
    quantity = Column(Integer)
    item_price = Column(Float) # Price at the time of order

    order = relationship("Order", back_populates="order_items")
    bicycle = relationship("Bicycle", back_populates="order_items")
    spare_part = relationship("SparePart", back_populates="order_items")
    accessory = relationship("Accessory", back_populates="order_items")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<OrderItem(order_id={self.order_id}, quantity={self.quantity})>"

def add_order_item(session, order_id, bicycle_id=None, spare_part_id=None, accessory_id=None, quantity=1, item_price=None):
    order = get_order_by_id(session, order_id)
    if not order:
        return None

    if bicycle_id:
        item = get_bicycle_by_id(session, bicycle_id)
    elif spare_part_id:
        item = get_spare_part_by_id(session, spare_part_id)
    elif accessory_id:
        item = get_accessory_by_id(session, accessory_id)
    else:
        return None

    if not item:
        return None

    if item_price is None:
        item_price = item.price

import sqlalchemy
from sqlalchemy import create_engine, Column, Integer, String, Float, ForeignKey, Boolean
from sqlalchemy.orm import sessionmaker, relationship
from sqlalchemy.ext.declarative import declarative_base

Base = declarative_base()

class Bicycle(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'bicycles'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String)
    brand = Column(String)
    model = Column(String)
    description = Column(String)
    price = Column(Float)
    quantity_in_stock = Column(Integer)
    category = Column(String)  # e.g., "Mountain", "Road", "Hybrid"
    frame_material = Column(String)
    wheel_size = Column(Integer)
    color = Column(String)
    weight_kg = Column(Float)

    order_items = relationship("OrderItem", back_populates="bicycle")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Bicycle(name='{self.name}', brand='{self.brand}', model='{self.model}', price={self.price})>"


class SparePart(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'spare_parts'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String)
    description = Column(String)
    price = Column(Float)
    quantity_in_stock = Column(Integer)
    category = Column(String)  # e.g., "Brakes", "Gears", "Tires"
    brand = Column(String)
    model = Column(String)
    compatible_bicycles = Column(String) # Store compatible bicycle models as comma-separated string

    order_items = relationship("OrderItem", back_populates="spare_part")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<SparePart(name='{self.name}', category='{self.category}', price={self.price})>"


class Accessory(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'accessories'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String)
    description = Column(String)
    price = Column(Float)
    quantity_in_stock = Column(Integer)
    category = Column(String)  # e.g., "Helmets", "Lights", "Locks"
    brand = Column(String)
    model = Column(String)
    size = Column(String, nullable=True) # e.g., "S", "M", "L" for helmets

    order_items = relationship("OrderItem", back_populates="accessory")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Accessory(name='{self.name}', category='{self.category}', price={self.price})>"


class Customer(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'customers'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    first_name = Column(String)
    last_name = Column(String)
    email = Column(String, unique=True)
    phone_number = Column(String)
    address = Column(String)

    orders = relationship("Order", back_populates="customer")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Customer(first_name='{self.first_name}', last_name='{self.last_name}', email='{self.email}')>"


class Order(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'orders'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    customer_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('customers.id'))
    order_date = Column(sqlalchemy.DateTime, default=sqlalchemy.func.now())
    total_amount = Column(Float)
    shipping_address = Column(String)
    order_status = Column(String, default="Pending") # e.g., "Pending", "Shipped", "Delivered", "Cancelled"

    customer = relationship("Customer", back_populates="orders")
    order_items = relationship("OrderItem", back_populates="order")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Order(id={self.id}, customer_id={self.customer_id}, order_date={self.order_date})>"


class OrderItem(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'order_items'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    order_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('orders.id'))
    bicycle_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('bicycles.id'), nullable=True)
    spare_part_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('spare_parts.id'), nullable=True)
    accessory_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('accessories.id'), nullable=True)
    quantity = Column(Integer)
    item_price = Column(Float) # Price at the time of order

    order = relationship("Order", back_populates="order_items")
    bicycle = relationship("Bicycle", back_populates="order_items")
    spare_part = relationship("SparePart", back_populates="order_items")
    accessory = relationship("Accessory", back_populates="order_items")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<OrderItem(order_id={self.order_id}, quantity={self.quantity})>"


def create_db_engine(db_url):
    engine = create_engine(db_url)
    return engine

def create_tables(engine):
    Base.metadata.create_all(engine)

def open_db_session(engine):
    Session = sessionmaker(bind=engine)
    return Session()

def close_db_session(session):
    session.close()

def add_bicycle(session, name, brand, model, description, price, quantity_in_stock, category, frame_material, wheel_size, color, weight_kg):
    bicycle = Bicycle(name=name, brand=brand, model=model, description=description, price=price, quantity_in_stock=quantity_in_stock, category=category, frame_material=frame_material, wheel_size=wheel_size, color=color, weight_kg=weight_kg)
    session.add(bicycle)
    session.commit()
    return bicycle

def get_bicycle_by_id(session, bicycle_id):
    return session.query(Bicycle).filter(Bicycle.id == bicycle_id).first()

def update_bicycle_quantity(session, bicycle_id, new_quantity):
    bicycle = get_bicycle_by_id(session, bicycle_id)
    if bicycle:
        bicycle.quantity_in_stock = new_quantity
        session.commit()
        return True
    return False

def delete_bicycle(session, bicycle_id):
    bicycle = get_bicycle_by_id(session, bicycle_id)
    if bicycle:
        session.delete(bicycle)
        session.commit()
        return True
    return False

def search_bicycles(session, search_term):
    return session.query(Bicycle).filter(
        (Bicycle.name.contains(search_term)) |
        (Bicycle.brand.contains(search_term)) |
        (Bicycle.model.contains(search_term)) |
        (Bicycle.description.contains(search_term))
    ).all()

def add_spare_part(session, name, description, price, quantity_in_stock, category, brand, model, compatible_bicycles):
    spare_part = SparePart(name=name, description=description, price=price, quantity_in_stock=quantity_in_stock, category=category, brand=brand, model=model, compatible_bicycles=compatible_bicycles)

    return session.query(SparePart).filter(SparePart.id == spare_part_id).first()

def update_spare_part_quantity(session, spare_part_id, new_quantity):
    spare_part = get_spare_part_by_id(session, spare_part_id)
    if spare_part:
        spare_part.quantity_in_stock = new_quantity
        session.commit()
        return True
    return False

def delete_spare_part(session, spare_part_id):
    spare_part = get_spare_part_by_id(session, spare_part_id)
    if spare_part:
        session.delete(spare_part)
        session.commit()
        return True

def search_spare_parts(session, search_term):
    return session.query(SparePart).filter(

        (SparePart.description.contains(search_term)) |
        (SparePart.brand.contains(search_term)) |
        (SparePart.model.contains(search_term))
    ).all()

def add_accessory(session, name, description, price, quantity_in_stock, category, brand, model, size=None):
    accessory = Accessory(name=name, description=description, price=price, quantity_in_stock=quantity_in_stock, category=category, brand=brand, model=model, size=size)
    session.add(accessory)
    session.commit()

def get_accessory_by_id(session, accessory_id):

def update_accessory_quantity(session, accessory_id, new_quantity):

    if accessory:

        session.commit()

def delete_accessory(session, accessory_id):

        (Accessory.brand.contains(search_term)) |

import sqlalchemy
from sqlalchemy import create_engine, Column, Integer, String, Float, ForeignKey, Boolean
from sqlalchemy.orm import sessionmaker, relationship
from sqlalchemy.ext.declarative import declarative_base

Base = declarative_base()

        session.delete(bicycle)
        session.commit()
        return True
    return False

        (Bicycle.name.contains(search_term)) |
        (Bicycle.brand.contains(search_term)) |
        (Bicycle.model.contains(search_term)) |
        (Bicycle.description.contains(search_term))
    ).all()

def filter_bicycles(session, category=None, brand=None, min_price=None, max_price=None):
    query = session.query(Bicycle)
    if category:
        query = query.filter(Bicycle.category == category)
    if brand:
        query = query.filter(Bicycle.brand == brand)
    if min_price:
        query = query.filter(Bicycle.price >= min_price)
    if max_price:
        query = query.filter(Bicycle.price <= max_price)
    return query.all()

def filter_spare_parts(session, category=None, brand=None, min_price=None, max_price=None):

    if brand:

    if min_price:

    if max_price:

import sqlalchemy
from sqlalchemy import create_engine, Column, Integer, String, Float, ForeignKey, DateTime, Boolean
from sqlalchemy.orm import sessionmaker, relationship
from sqlalchemy.ext.declarative import declarative_base
import datetime

Base = declarative_base()

class Bicycle(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'bicycles'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String(255), nullable=False)
    description = Column(String(1000))
    price = Column(Float, nullable=False)
    brand = Column(String(255))
    model = Column(String(255))
    frame_material = Column(String(255))
    wheel_size = Column(Integer)
    gears = Column(Integer)
    weight = Column(Float)
    stock_quantity = Column(Integer, default=0)
    image_url = Column(String(255))

    orders = relationship("OrderItem", back_populates="bicycle")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Bicycle(name='{self.name}', price={self.price})>"


class SparePart(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'spare_parts'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String(255), nullable=False)
    description = Column(String(1000))
    price = Column(Float, nullable=False)
    brand = Column(String(255))
    part_type = Column(String(255))  # e.g., "Brakes", "Tires", "Chain"
    compatible_bicycles = Column(String(255)) # List of compatible bicycle models
    stock_quantity = Column(Integer, default=0)
    image_url = Column(String(255))

    orders = relationship("OrderItem", back_populates="spare_part")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<SparePart(name='{self.name}', price={self.price})>"


class Accessory(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'accessories'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String(255), nullable=False)
    description = Column(String(1000))
    price = Column(Float, nullable=False)
    brand = Column(String(255))
    accessory_type = Column(String(255)) # e.g., "Helmets", "Lights", "Locks"
    stock_quantity = Column(Integer, default=0)
    image_url = Column(String(255))

    orders = relationship("OrderItem", back_populates="accessory")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Accessory(name='{self.name}', price={self.price})>"


class Customer(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'customers'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    first_name = Column(String(255), nullable=False)
    last_name = Column(String(255), nullable=False)
    email = Column(String(255), unique=True, nullable=False)
    phone_number = Column(String(20))
    address = Column(String(255))
    city = Column(String(255))
    state = Column(String(255))
    zip_code = Column(String(10))

    orders = relationship("Order", back_populates="customer")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Customer(name='{self.first_name} {self.last_name}', email='{self.email}')>"


class Order(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'orders'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    customer_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('customers.id'))
    order_date = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.datetime.utcnow)
    total_amount = Column(Float)
    status = Column(String(255), default="Pending") # e.g., "Pending", "Shipped", "Delivered", "Cancelled"

    customer = relationship("Customer", back_populates="orders")
    order_items = relationship("OrderItem", back_populates="order")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Order(id={self.id}, customer_id={self.customer_id}, order_date={self.order_date})>"


class OrderItem(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'order_items'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    order_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('orders.id'))
    bicycle_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('bicycles.id'), nullable=True)
    spare_part_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('spare_parts.id'), nullable=True)
    accessory_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('accessories.id'), nullable=True)
    quantity = Column(Integer, nullable=False)
    price = Column(Float, nullable=False)  # Price at the time of order

    order = relationship("Order", back_populates="order_items")
    bicycle = relationship("Bicycle", back_populates="orders")
    spare_part = relationship("SparePart", back_populates="orders")
    accessory = relationship("Accessory", back_populates="orders")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<OrderItem(order_id={self.order_id}, quantity={self.quantity}, price={self.price})>"


class DatabaseManager:
    def __init__(self, db_url):
        self.engine = create_engine(db_url)
        Base.metadata.create_all(self.engine)
        self.Session = sessionmaker(bind=self.engine)
        self.session = None

    def open_session(self):
        self.session = self.Session()

    def close_session(self):
        if self.session:
            self.session.close()
            self.session = None

    def add_item(self, item):
        self.open_session()
        self.session.add(item)
        self.session.commit()
        self.close_session()

    def delete_item(self, item):
        self.open_session()
        self.session.delete(item)
        self.session.commit()
        self.close_session()

    def update_item(self, item):
        self.open_session()
        self.session.commit()
        self.close_session()

    def get_item_by_id(self, model, item_id):
        self.open_session()
        item = self.session.query(model).get(item_id)
        self.close_session()
        return item

    def get_all_items(self, model):
        self.open_session()
        items = self.session.query(model).all()
        self.close_session()
        return items

    def filter_items(self, model, **kwargs):
        self.open_session()
        query = self.session.query(model)
        for key, value in kwargs.items():
            query = query.filter(getattr(model, key) == value)
        items = query.all()
        self.close_session()
        return items

    def search_items(self, model, search_term, *fields):
        self.open_session()
        filters = []
        for field in fields:
            filters.append(getattr(model, field).like(f"%{search_term}%"))
        items = self.session.query(model).filter(sqlalchemy.or_(*filters)).all()
        self.close_session()
        return items

    def execute_query(self, query):
        self.open_session()
        result = self.session.execute(query).fetchall()
        self.close_session()
        return result

if __name__ == '__main__':
    db_url = 'sqlite:///./bicycle_shop.db'  # Use an absolute path or a relative path from the script's location
    db_manager = DatabaseManager(db_url)

    # Example Usage:

    # Add a bicycle
    bicycle1 = Bicycle(name="Mountain Bike", description="Great for trails", price=500.00, brand="Trek", model="X-Caliber 7", frame_material="Aluminum", wheel_size=29, gears=24, weight=30.0, stock_quantity=10, image_url="url_to_image")
    db_manager.add_item(bicycle1)

    # Add a spare part
    spare_part1 = SparePart(name="Brake Pads", description="High performance brake pads", price=25.00, brand="Shimano", part_type="Brakes", compatible_bicycles="All Mountain Bikes", stock_quantity=50, image_url="url_to_image")
    db_manager.add_item(spare_part1)

    # Add an accessory
    accessory1 = Accessory(name="Helmet", description="Protective helmet", price=50.00, brand="Giro", accessory_type="Helmets", stock_quantity=20, image_url="url_to_image")
    db_manager.add_item(accessory1)

    # Add a customer
    customer1 = Customer(first_name="John", last_name="Doe", email="john.doe@example.com", phone_number="555-123-4567", address="123 Main St", city="Anytown", state="CA", zip_code="91234")
    db_manager.add_item(customer1)

    # Add an order
    order1 = Order(customer_id=customer1.id, total_amount=550.00)
    db_manager.add_item(order1)

    # Add an order item
    order_item1 = OrderItem(order_id=order1.id, bicycle_id=bicycle1.id, quantity=1, price=bicycle1.price)
    db_manager.add_item(order_item1)

    # Get a bicycle by ID
    retrieved_bicycle = db_manager.get_item_by_id(Bicycle, bicycle1.id)
    print(f"Retrieved Bicycle: {retrieved_bicycle}")

    # Filter bicycles by brand
    trek_bicycles = db_manager.filter_items(Bicycle, brand="Trek")
    print(f"Trek Bicycles: {trek_bicycles}")

    # Search for items containing "bike" in the name or description
    search_results = db_manager.search_items(Bicycle, "Bike", "name", "description")
    print(f"Search Results: {search_results}")

    # Update the stock quantity of the bicycle
    bicycle1.stock_quantity = 8
    db_manager.update_item(bicycle1)

    # Verify the update
    updated_bicycle = db_manager.get_item_by_id(Bicycle, bicycle1.id)
    print(f"Updated Bicycle Stock: {updated_bicycle.stock_quantity}")

    # Example of raw query
    query = sqlalchemy.text("SELECT * FROM bicycles WHERE brand = :brand")
    result = db_manager.execute_query(query.bindparams(brand="Trek"))
    print(f"Raw Query Result: {result}")

    # Delete the bicycle (careful with foreign key constraints!)
    # First, delete the order item associated with the bicycle
    order_item_to_delete = db_manager.get_item_by_id(OrderItem, order_item1.id)
    db_manager.delete_item(order_item_to_delete)

    # Then, delete the order
    order_to_delete = db_manager.get_item_by_id(Order, order1.id)
    db_manager.delete_item(order_to_delete)

    # Finally, delete the bicycle
    bicycle_to_delete = db_manager.get_item_by_id(Bicycle, bicycle1.id)
    db_manager.delete_item(bicycle_to_delete)

    # Delete the spare part
    spare_part_to_delete = db_manager.get_item_by_id(SparePart, spare_part1.id)
    db_manager.delete_item(spare_part_to_delete)

    # Delete the accessory
    accessory_to_delete = db_manager.get_item_by_id(Accessory, accessory1.id)
    db_manager.delete_item(accessory_to_delete)

    # Delete the customer
    customer_to_delete = db_manager.get_item_by_id(Customer, customer1.id)
    db_manager.delete_item(customer_to_delete)

        return items

    def filter_items(self, model, **kwargs):
        self.open_session()
        query = self.session.query(model)
        for key, value in kwargs.items():
            query = query.filter(getattr(model, key) == value)
        items = query.all()
        self.close_session()
        return items

    def search_items(self, model, search_term, *fields):
        self.open_session()
        filters = []
        for field in fields:
            filters.append(getattr(model, field).like(f"%{search_term}%"))
        items = self.session.query(model).filter(sqlalchemy.or_(*filters)).all()
        self.close_session()
        return items

    def execute_query(self, query):
        self.open_session()
        result = self.session.execute(query).fetchall()
        self.close_session()
        return result

import sqlalchemy
from sqlalchemy import create_engine, Column, Integer, String, Float, ForeignKey, DateTime, Boolean
from sqlalchemy.orm import sessionmaker, relationship
from sqlalchemy.ext.declarative import declarative_base
import datetime

Base = declarative_base()

class Bicycle(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'bicycles'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String(255), nullable=False)
    description = Column(String(1000))
    price = Column(Float, nullable=False)
    brand = Column(String(255))
    model = Column(String(255))
    frame_material = Column(String(255))
    wheel_size = Column(Integer)
    gears = Column(Integer)
    weight = Column(Float)
    stock_quantity = Column(Integer, default=0)
    image_url = Column(String(255))

    orders = relationship("OrderItem", back_populates="bicycle")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Bicycle(name='{self.name}', price={self.price})>"


class SparePart(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'spare_parts'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String(255), nullable=False)
    description = Column(String(1000))
    price = Column(Float, nullable=False)
    brand = Column(String(255))
    part_type = Column(String(255))  # e.g., "Brakes", "Tires", "Chain"
    compatible_bicycles = Column(String(255)) # List of compatible bicycle models
    stock_quantity = Column(Integer, default=0)
    image_url = Column(String(255))

    orders = relationship("OrderItem", back_populates="spare_part")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<SparePart(name='{self.name}', price={self.price})>"


class Accessory(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'accessories'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String(255), nullable=False)
    description = Column(String(1000))
    price = Column(Float, nullable=False)
    brand = Column(String(255))
    accessory_type = Column(String(255)) # e.g., "Helmets", "Lights", "Locks"
    stock_quantity = Column(Integer, default=0)
    image_url = Column(String(255))

    orders = relationship("OrderItem", back_populates="accessory")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Accessory(name='{self.name}', price={self.price})>"


class Customer(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'customers'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    first_name = Column(String(255), nullable=False)
    last_name = Column(String(255), nullable=False)
    email = Column(String(255), unique=True, nullable=False)
    phone_number = Column(String(20))
    address = Column(String(255))
    city = Column(String(255))
    state = Column(String(255))
    zip_code = Column(String(10))

    orders = relationship("Order", back_populates="customer")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Customer(name='{self.first_name} {self.last_name}', email='{self.email}')>"


class Order(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'orders'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    customer_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('customers.id'))
    order_date = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.datetime.utcnow)
    total_amount = Column(Float)
    status = Column(String(255), default="Pending") # e.g., "Pending", "Shipped", "Delivered", "Cancelled"

    customer = relationship("Customer", back_populates="orders")
    order_items = relationship("OrderItem", back_populates="order")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Order(id={self.id}, customer_id={self.customer_id}, order_date={self.order_date})>"


class OrderItem(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'order_items'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    order_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('orders.id'))
    bicycle_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('bicycles.id'), nullable=True)
    spare_part_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('spare_parts.id'), nullable=True)
    accessory_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('accessories.id'), nullable=True)
    quantity = Column(Integer, nullable=False)
    price = Column(Float, nullable=False)  # Price at the time of order

    order = relationship("Order", back_populates="order_items")
    bicycle = relationship("Bicycle", back_populates="orders")
    spare_part = relationship("SparePart", back_populates="orders")
    accessory = relationship("Accessory", back_populates="orders")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<OrderItem(order_id={self.order_id}, quantity={self.quantity}, price={self.price})>"


class DatabaseManager:
    def __init__(self, db_url):
        self.engine = create_engine(db_url)
        Base.metadata.create_all(self.engine)
        self.Session = sessionmaker(bind=self.engine)
        self.session = None

    def open_session(self):
        self.session = self.Session()

    def close_session(self):
        if self.session:
            self.session.close()
            self.session = None

    def add_item(self, item):
        self.open_session()
        self.session.add(item)
        self.session.commit()
        self.close_session()

    def delete_item(self, item):
        self.open_session()
        self.session.delete(item)
        self.session.commit()
        self.close_session()

    def update_item(self, item):
        self.open_session()
        self.session.commit()
        self.close_session()

    def get_item_by_id(self, model, item_id):
        self.open_session()
        item = self.session.query(model).get(item_id)
        self.close_session()
        return item

    def get_all_items(self, model):
        self.open_session()
        items = self.session.query(model).all()
        self.close_session()
        return items

    def filter_items(self, model, **kwargs):
        self.open_session()
        query = self.session.query(model)
        for key, value in kwargs.items():
            query = query.filter(getattr(model, key) == value)
        items = query.all()
        self.close_session()
        return items

    def search_items(self, model, search_term, *fields):
        self.open_session()
        filters = []
        for field in fields:
            filters.append(getattr(model, field).like(f"%{search_term}%"))
        items = self.session.query(model).filter(sqlalchemy.or_(*filters)).all()
        self.close_session()
        return items

    def execute_query(self, query):
        self.open_session()
        result = self.session.execute(query).fetchall()
        self.close_session()
        return result

import sqlalchemy
from sqlalchemy import create_engine, Column, Integer, String, Float, ForeignKey, Boolean
from sqlalchemy.orm import sessionmaker, relationship
from sqlalchemy.ext.declarative import declarative_base

Base = declarative_base()

class Bicycle(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'bicycles'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String)
    brand = Column(String)
    model = Column(String)
    description = Column(String)
    price = Column(Float)
    quantity = Column(Integer)
    category = Column(String) # e.g., "Mountain", "Road", "Hybrid"
    frame_material = Column(String)
    wheel_size = Column(Integer) # in inches
    color = Column(String)
    year = Column(Integer)

    orders = relationship("OrderItem", back_populates="bicycle")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Bicycle(name='{self.name}', brand='{self.brand}', model='{self.model}', price={self.price})>"


class SparePart(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'spare_parts'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String)
    description = Column(String)
    price = Column(Float)
    quantity = Column(Integer)
    category = Column(String) # e.g., "Brakes", "Gears", "Wheels"
    brand = Column(String)
    model = Column(String)
    compatible_bicycles = Column(String) # comma-separated list of bicycle models
    weight = Column(Float) # in grams

    orders = relationship("OrderItem", back_populates="spare_part")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<SparePart(name='{self.name}', category='{self.category}', price={self.price})>"


class Accessory(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'accessories'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String)
    description = Column(String)
    price = Column(Float)
    quantity = Column(Integer)
    category = Column(String) # e.g., "Helmets", "Lights", "Locks"
    brand = Column(String)
    model = Column(String)
    size = Column(String, nullable=True) # e.g., "S", "M", "L"
    color = Column(String)
    material = Column(String)

    orders = relationship("OrderItem", back_populates="accessory")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Accessory(name='{self.name}', category='{self.category}', price={self.price})>"


class Customer(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'customers'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    first_name = Column(String)
    last_name = Column(String)
    email = Column(String)
    phone_number = Column(String)
    address = Column(String)
    city = Column(String)
    state = Column(String)
    zip_code = Column(String)

    orders = relationship("Order", back_populates="customer")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Customer(first_name='{self.first_name}', last_name='{self.last_name}', email='{self.email}')>"


class Order(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'orders'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    customer_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('customers.id'))
    order_date = Column(sqlalchemy.DateTime)
    shipping_address = Column(String)
    total_amount = Column(Float)
    status = Column(String) # e.g., "Pending", "Shipped", "Delivered"

    customer = relationship("Customer", back_populates="orders")
    order_items = relationship("OrderItem", back_populates="order")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Order(id={self.id}, customer_id={self.customer_id}, order_date={self.order_date})>"


class OrderItem(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'order_items'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    order_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('orders.id'))
    bicycle_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('bicycles.id'), nullable=True)
    spare_part_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('spare_parts.id'), nullable=True)
    accessory_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('accessories.id'), nullable=True)
    quantity = Column(Integer)
    price = Column(Float) # Price at the time of order

    order = relationship("Order", back_populates="order_items")
    bicycle = relationship("Bicycle", back_populates="orders")
    spare_part = relationship("SparePart", back_populates="orders")
    accessory = relationship("Accessory", back_populates="orders")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<OrderItem(order_id={self.order_id}, quantity={self.quantity}, price={self.price})>"


def create_db_engine(db_url):
    engine = create_engine(db_url)
    return engine

def create_tables(engine):
    Base.metadata.create_all(engine)

def open_db_session(engine):
    Session = sessionmaker(bind=engine)
    return Session()

def close_db_session(session):
    session.close()

def add_bicycle(session, name, brand, model, description, price, quantity, category, frame_material, wheel_size, color, year):
    bicycle = Bicycle(name=name, brand=brand, model=model, description=description, price=price, quantity=quantity, category=category, frame_material=frame_material, wheel_size=wheel_size, color=color, year=year)
    session.add(bicycle)
    session.commit()
    return bicycle

def get_bicycle_by_id(session, bicycle_id):
    return session.query(Bicycle).filter(Bicycle.id == bicycle_id).first()

def update_bicycle_quantity(session, bicycle_id, new_quantity):
    bicycle = get_bicycle_by_id(session, bicycle_id)
    if bicycle:
        bicycle.quantity = new_quantity
        session.commit()
        return True
    return False

def delete_bicycle(session, bicycle_id):
    bicycle = get_bicycle_by_id(session, bicycle_id)
    if bicycle:
        session.delete(bicycle)
        session.commit()
        return True
    return False

def search_bicycles(session, search_term):
    return session.query(Bicycle).filter(
        (Bicycle.name.contains(search_term)) |
        (Bicycle.brand.contains(search_term)) |
        (Bicycle.model.contains(search_term)) |
        (Bicycle.description.contains(search_term))
    ).all()

def filter_bicycles(session, category=None, brand=None, min_price=None, max_price=None):
    query = session.query(Bicycle)
    if category:
        query = query.filter(Bicycle.category == category)
    if brand:
        query = query.filter(Bicycle.brand == brand)
    if min_price:
        query = query.filter(Bicycle.price >= min_price)
    if max_price:
        query = query.filter(Bicycle.price <= max_price)
    return query.all()

def get_accessory_by_id(session, accessory_id):

def search_accessories(session, search_term):

def filter_accessories(session, category=None, brand=None, min_price=None, max_price=None):

    session.add(customer)

    return customer

def get_customer_by_id(session, customer_id):
    return session.query(Customer).filter(Customer.id == customer_id).first()

def update_customer_address(session, customer_id, new_address, new_city, new_state, new_zip_code):
    customer = get_customer_by_id(session, customer_id)
    if customer:
        customer.address = new_address
        customer.city = new_city
        customer.state = new_state
        customer.zip_code = new_zip_code
        session.commit()
        return True
    return False

def delete_customer(session, customer_id):
    customer = get_customer_by_id(session, customer_id)
    if customer:
        session.delete(customer)
        session.commit()
        return True
    return False

    order = Order(customer_id=customer_id, order_date=order_date, shipping_address=shipping_address, total_amount=total_amount, status=status)
    session.add(order)
    session.commit()
    return order

    return session.query(Order).filter(Order.id == order_id).first()

def update_order_status(session, order_id, new_status):

    if order:

        session.commit()
        return True
    return False

def delete_order(session, order_id):

    if order:
        session.delete(order)
        session.commit()
        return True
    return False

def add_order_item(session, order_id, bicycle_id, spare_part_id, accessory_id, quantity, price):
    order_item = OrderItem(order_id=order_id, bicycle_id=bicycle_id, spare_part_id=spare_part_id, accessory_id=accessory_id, quantity=quantity, price=price)

    session.commit()
    return order_item

def get_order_item_by_id(session, order_item_id):

def update_order_item_quantity(session, order_item_id, new_quantity):

import sqlalchemy
from sqlalchemy import create_engine, Column, Integer, String, Float, ForeignKey, Boolean
from sqlalchemy.orm import sessionmaker, relationship
from sqlalchemy.ext.declarative import declarative_base

Base = declarative_base()

class Bicycle(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'bicycles'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String)
    brand = Column(String)
    model = Column(String)
    description = Column(String)
    price = Column(Float)
    category = Column(String)  # e.g., Road, Mountain, Hybrid
    in_stock = Column(Integer)
    image_url = Column(String)

    order_items = relationship("OrderItem", back_populates="bicycle")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Bicycle(name='{self.name}', brand='{self.brand}', model='{self.model}', price={self.price})>"


class Part(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'parts'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String)
    description = Column(String)
    price = Column(Float)
    category = Column(String)  # e.g., Brakes, Drivetrain, Wheels
    in_stock = Column(Integer)
    image_url = Column(String)

    order_items = relationship("OrderItem", back_populates="part")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Part(name='{self.name}', category='{self.category}', price={self.price})>"


class Accessory(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'accessories'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String)
    description = Column(String)
    price = Column(Float)
    category = Column(String)  # e.g., Helmets, Lights, Locks
    in_stock = Column(Integer)
    image_url = Column(String)

    order_items = relationship("OrderItem", back_populates="accessory")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Accessory(name='{self.name}', category='{self.category}', price={self.price})>"


class User(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'users'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    username = Column(String, unique=True, nullable=False)
    password = Column(String, nullable=False)  # In real app, hash this!
    email = Column(String, unique=True)
    first_name = Column(String)
    last_name = Column(String)
    address = Column(String)
    city = Column(String)
    state = Column(String)
    zip_code = Column(String)

    orders = relationship("Order", back_populates="user")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<User(username='{self.username}', email='{self.email}')>"


class Order(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'orders'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    user_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('users.id'))
    order_date = Column(sqlalchemy.DateTime, default=sqlalchemy.func.now())
    total_amount = Column(Float)
    status = Column(String, default='Pending')  # e.g., Pending, Shipped, Delivered

    user = relationship("User", back_populates="orders")
    order_items = relationship("OrderItem", back_populates="order")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Order(id={self.id}, user_id={self.user_id}, order_date={self.order_date}, total_amount={self.total_amount})>"


class OrderItem(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'order_items'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    order_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('orders.id'))
    bicycle_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('bicycles.id'), nullable=True)
    part_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('parts.id'), nullable=True)
    accessory_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('accessories.id'), nullable=True)
    quantity = Column(Integer)
    price = Column(Float)  # Price at the time of order

    order = relationship("Order", back_populates="order_items")
    bicycle = relationship("Bicycle", back_populates="order_items")
    part = relationship("Part", back_populates="order_items")
    accessory = relationship("Accessory", back_populates="order_items")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<OrderItem(order_id={self.order_id}, quantity={self.quantity}, price={self.price})>"


class DatabaseManager:
    def __init__(self, db_url):
        self.engine = create_engine(db_url)
        Base.metadata.create_all(self.engine)
        self.Session = sessionmaker(bind=self.engine)
        self.session = None

    def open_connection(self):
        self.session = self.Session()

    def close_connection(self):
        if self.session:
            self.session.close()
            self.session = None

    def add_item(self, item):
        self.session.add(item)
        self.session.commit()

    def delete_item(self, item):
        self.session.delete(item)
        self.session.commit()

    def update_item(self, item, **kwargs):
        for key, value in kwargs.items():
            setattr(item, key, value)
        self.session.commit()

    def get_item_by_id(self, model, item_id):
        return self.session.query(model).get(item_id)

    def get_all_items(self, model):
        return self.session.query(model).all()

    def filter_items(self, model, **kwargs):
        query = self.session.query(model)
        for key, value in kwargs.items():
            query = query.filter(getattr(model, key) == value)
        return query.all()

    def search_items(self, model, search_term, fields):
        from sqlalchemy import or_
        search_term = f"%{search_term}%"
        filters = [getattr(model, field).like(search_term) for field in fields]
        return self.session.query(model).filter(or_(*filters)).all()

    def execute_query(self, query):
        return self.session.execute(query).fetchall()

if __name__ == '__main__':
    # Example Usage
    db_url = 'sqlite:///./bicycle_shop.db'  # Use an in-memory database for testing
    db_manager = DatabaseManager(db_url)

    # Open Connection
    db_manager.open_connection()

    # Example: Add a bicycle
    bicycle1 = Bicycle(name='Mountain Bike', brand='Trek', model='X-Caliber 8', price=899.99, category='Mountain', in_stock=10)
    db_manager.add_item(bicycle1)

    # Example: Add a part
    part1 = Part(name='Shimano Deore XT Brakes', category='Brakes', price=150.00, in_stock=20)
    db_manager.add_item(part1)

    # Example: Add an accessory
    accessory1 = Accessory(name='Bike Helmet', category='Helmets', price=50.00, in_stock=30)
    db_manager.add_item(accessory1)

    # Example: Add a user
    user1 = User(username='testuser', password='password123', email='test@example.com')
    db_manager.add_item(user1)

    # Example: Add an order
    order1 = Order(user_id=user1.id, total_amount=1099.99)
    db_manager.add_item(order1)

    # Example: Add an order item
    order_item1 = OrderItem(order_id=order1.id, bicycle_id=bicycle1.id, quantity=1, price=bicycle1.price)
    db_manager.add_item(order_item1)

    # Example: Get bicycle by ID
    retrieved_bicycle = db_manager.get_item_by_id(Bicycle, bicycle1.id)
    print(f"Retrieved Bicycle: {retrieved_bicycle}")

    # Example: Filter bicycles by brand
    trek_bikes = db_manager.filter_items(Bicycle, brand='Trek')
    print(f"Trek Bikes: {trek_bikes}")

    # Example: Search for items
    search_results = db_manager.search_items(Bicycle, 'Mountain', ['name', 'category'])
    print(f"Search Results: {search_results}")

    # Example: Update bicycle price
    db_manager.update_item(bicycle1, price=949.99)
    updated_bicycle = db_manager.get_item_by_id(Bicycle, bicycle1.id)
    print(f"Updated Bicycle Price: {updated_bicycle.price}")

    # Example: Delete a part
    #db_manager.delete_item(part1) #Uncomment to delete

    # Example: Get all bicycles
    all_bicycles = db_manager.get_all_items(Bicycle)
    print(f"All Bicycles: {all_bicycles}")

    # Close Connection
    db_manager.close_connection()

    bicycle = relationship("Bicycle", back_populates="order_items")
    part = relationship("Part", back_populates="order_items")
    accessory = relationship("Accessory", back_populates="order_items")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<OrderItem(order_id={self.order_id}, quantity={self.quantity}, price={self.price})>"


class DatabaseManager:
    def __init__(self, db_url):
        self.engine = create_engine(db_url)
        Base.metadata.create_all(self.engine)
        self.Session = sessionmaker(bind=self.engine)
        self.session = None

    def open_connection(self):
        self.session = self.Session()

    def close_connection(self):
        if self.session:
            self.session.close()
            self.session = None

    def add_item(self, item):
        self.session.add(item)
        self.session.commit()

    def delete_item(self, item):
        self.session.delete(item)
        self.session.commit()

    def update_item(self, item, **kwargs):
        for key, value in kwargs.items():
            setattr(item, key, value)
        self.session.commit()

    def get_item_by_id(self, model, item_id):
        return self.session.query(model).get(item_id)

    def get_all_items(self, model):
        return self.session.query(model).all()

    def filter_items(self, model, **kwargs):
        query = self.session.query(model)
        for key, value in kwargs.items():
            query = query.filter(getattr(model, key) == value)
        return query.all()

    def search_items(self, model, search_term, fields):
        from sqlalchemy import or_
        search_term = f"%{search_term}%"
        filters = [getattr(model, field).like(search_term) for field in fields]
        return self.session.query(model).filter(or_(*filters)).all()

    def execute_query(self, query):
        return self.session.execute(query).fetchall()

import sqlalchemy
from sqlalchemy import create_engine, Column, Integer, String, Float, ForeignKey, Boolean
from sqlalchemy.orm import sessionmaker, relationship
from sqlalchemy.ext.declarative import declarative_base

Base = declarative_base()

class Bicycle(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'bicycles'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String)
    brand = Column(String)
    model = Column(String)
    description = Column(String)
    price = Column(Float)
    category = Column(String)  # e.g., Road, Mountain, Hybrid
    in_stock = Column(Integer)
    image_url = Column(String)

    order_items = relationship("OrderItem", back_populates="bicycle")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Bicycle(name='{self.name}', brand='{self.brand}', model='{self.model}', price={self.price})>"


class Part(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'parts'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String)
    description = Column(String)
    price = Column(Float)
    category = Column(String)  # e.g., Brakes, Drivetrain, Wheels
    in_stock = Column(Integer)
    image_url = Column(String)

    order_items = relationship("OrderItem", back_populates="part")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Part(name='{self.name}', category='{self.category}', price={self.price})>"


class Accessory(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'accessories'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String)
    description = Column(String)
    price = Column(Float)
    category = Column(String)  # e.g., Helmets, Lights, Locks
    in_stock = Column(Integer)
    image_url = Column(String)

    order_items = relationship("OrderItem", back_populates="accessory")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Accessory(name='{self.name}', category='{self.category}', price={self.price})>"


class User(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'users'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    username = Column(String, unique=True, nullable=False)
    password = Column(String, nullable=False)  # In real app, hash this!
    email = Column(String, unique=True)
    first_name = Column(String)
    last_name = Column(String)
    address = Column(String)
    city = Column(String)
    state = Column(String)
    zip_code = Column(String)

    orders = relationship("Order", back_populates="user")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<User(username='{self.username}', email='{self.email}')>"


class Order(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'orders'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    user_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('users.id'))
    order_date = Column(sqlalchemy.DateTime, default=sqlalchemy.func.now())
    total_amount = Column(Float)
    status = Column(String, default='Pending')  # e.g., Pending, Shipped, Delivered

    user = relationship("User", back_populates="orders")
    order_items = relationship("OrderItem", back_populates="order")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Order(id={self.id}, user_id={self.user_id}, order_date={self.order_date}, total_amount={self.total_amount})>"


class OrderItem(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'order_items'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    order_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('orders.id'))
    bicycle_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('bicycles.id'), nullable=True)
    part_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('parts.id'), nullable=True)
    accessory_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('accessories.id'), nullable=True)

    accessory = relationship("Accessory", back_populates="order_items")

import sqlalchemy
from sqlalchemy import create_engine, Column, Integer, String, Float, ForeignKey, DateTime, Boolean
from sqlalchemy.orm import relationship, sessionmaker
from sqlalchemy.ext.declarative import declarative_base
import datetime

Base = declarative_base()

class Bicycle(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'bicycles'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String(255), nullable=False)
    description = Column(String(1000))
    price = Column(Float, nullable=False)
    brand = Column(String(255))
    model = Column(String(255))
    frame_material = Column(String(255))
    wheel_size = Column(Integer)
    color = Column(String(255))
    quantity_in_stock = Column(Integer, default=0)
    image_url = Column(String(255))

    reviews = relationship("Review", back_populates="bicycle")
    order_items = relationship("OrderItem", back_populates="bicycle")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Bicycle(name='{self.name}', price={self.price})>"


class SparePart(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'spare_parts'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String(255), nullable=False)
    description = Column(String(1000))
    price = Column(Float, nullable=False)
    brand = Column(String(255))
    part_number = Column(String(255))
    compatible_bicycles = Column(String(1000))  # Store compatible bicycle models as a comma-separated string
    quantity_in_stock = Column(Integer, default=0)
    image_url = Column(String(255))

    order_items = relationship("OrderItem", back_populates="spare_part")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<SparePart(name='{self.name}', price={self.price})>"


class Accessory(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'accessories'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String(255), nullable=False)
    description = Column(String(1000))
    price = Column(Float, nullable=False)
    brand = Column(String(255))
    type = Column(String(255))  # e.g., Helmet, Lights, Lock
    quantity_in_stock = Column(Integer, default=0)
    image_url = Column(String(255))

    order_items = relationship("OrderItem", back_populates="accessory")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Accessory(name='{self.name}', price={self.price})>"


class User(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'users'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    username = Column(String(255), unique=True, nullable=False)
    password = Column(String(255), nullable=False)  # In real app, hash this!
    email = Column(String(255), unique=True)
    first_name = Column(String(255))
    last_name = Column(String(255))
    address = Column(String(255))
    phone_number = Column(String(20))
    is_admin = Column(Boolean, default=False)

    orders = relationship("Order", back_populates="user")
    reviews = relationship("Review", back_populates="user")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<User(username='{self.username}', email='{self.email}')>"


class Order(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'orders'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    user_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('users.id'))
    order_date = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.datetime.utcnow)
    total_amount = Column(Float)
    shipping_address = Column(String(255))
    status = Column(String(255), default='Pending')  # e.g., Pending, Shipped, Delivered

    user = relationship("User", back_populates="orders")
    order_items = relationship("OrderItem", back_populates="order")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Order(id={self.id}, user_id={self.user_id}, order_date={self.order_date})>"


class OrderItem(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'order_items'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    order_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('orders.id'))
    bicycle_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('bicycles.id'), nullable=True)
    spare_part_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('spare_parts.id'), nullable=True)
    accessory_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('accessories.id'), nullable=True)
    quantity = Column(Integer, nullable=False)
    price_per_item = Column(Float, nullable=False)  # Store the price at the time of order

    order = relationship("Order", back_populates="order_items")
    bicycle = relationship("Bicycle", back_populates="order_items")
    spare_part = relationship("SparePart", back_populates="order_items")
    accessory = relationship("Accessory", back_populates="order_items")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<OrderItem(order_id={self.order_id}, quantity={self.quantity})>"


class Review(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'reviews'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    user_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('users.id'))
    bicycle_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('bicycles.id'))
    rating = Column(Integer)  # e.g., 1-5 stars
    comment = Column(String(1000))
    review_date = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.datetime.utcnow)

    user = relationship("User", back_populates="reviews")
    bicycle = relationship("Bicycle", back_populates="reviews")

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Review(user_id={self.user_id}, bicycle_id={self.bicycle_id}, rating={self.rating})>"


class DatabaseManager:
    def __init__(self, db_url):
        self.engine = create_engine(db_url)
        Base.metadata.create_all(self.engine)
        self.Session = sessionmaker(bind=self.engine)
        self.session = None

    def open_connection(self):
        self.session = self.Session()

    def close_connection(self):
        if self.session:
            self.session.close()
            self.session = None

    def add_item(self, item):
        self.session.add(item)
        self.session.commit()

    def delete_item(self, item):
        self.session.delete(item)
        self.session.commit()

    def update_item(self, item):
        self.session.commit()  # SQLAlchemy tracks changes, so just commit

    def get_bicycle_by_id(self, bicycle_id):
        return self.session.query(Bicycle).filter_by(id=bicycle_id).first()

    def get_spare_part_by_id(self, spare_part_id):
        return self.session.query(SparePart).filter_by(id=spare_part_id).first()

    def get_accessory_by_id(self, accessory_id):
        return self.session.query(Accessory).filter_by(id=accessory_id).first()

    def get_user_by_id(self, user_id):
        return self.session.query(User).filter_by(id=user_id).first()

    def get_order_by_id(self, order_id):
        return self.session.query(Order).filter_by(id=order_id).first()

    def get_all_bicycles(self):
        return self.session.query(Bicycle).all()

    def get_all_spare_parts(self):
        return self.session.query(SparePart).all()

    def get_all_accessories(self):
        return self.session.query(Accessory).all()

    def get_all_users(self):
        return self.session.query(User).all()

    def get_all_orders(self):
        return self.session.query(Order).all()

    def filter_bicycles(self, brand=None, frame_material=None, min_price=None, max_price=None):
        query = self.session.query(Bicycle)
        if brand:
            query = query.filter(Bicycle.brand == brand)
        if frame_material:
            query = query.filter(Bicycle.frame_material == frame_material)
        if min_price:
            query = query.filter(Bicycle.price >= min_price)
        if max_price:
            query = query.filter(Bicycle.price <= max_price)
        return query.all()

    def search_bicycles(self, search_term):
        search_term = f"%{search_term}%"
        return self.session.query(Bicycle).filter(
            Bicycle.name.like(search_term) |
            Bicycle.description.like(search_term) |
            Bicycle.brand.like(search_term) |
            Bicycle.model.like(search_term)
        ).all()

    def filter_spare_parts(self, brand=None, compatible_bicycles=None, min_price=None, max_price=None):
        query = self.session.query(SparePart)
        if brand:
            query = query.filter(SparePart.brand == brand)
        if compatible_bicycles:
            query = query.filter(SparePart.compatible_bicycles.like(f"%{compatible_bicycles}%"))
        if min_price:
            query = query.filter(SparePart.price >= min_price)
        if max_price:
            query = query.filter(SparePart.price <= max_price)
        return query.all()

    def search_spare_parts(self, search_term):
        search_term = f"%{search_term}%"
        return self.session.query(SparePart).filter(
            SparePart.name.like(search_term) |
            SparePart.description.like(search_term) |
            SparePart.brand.like(search_term) |
            SparePart.part_number.like(search_term)
        ).all()

    def filter_accessories(self, brand=None, type=None, min_price=None, max_price=None):
        query = self.session.query(Accessory)
        if brand:
            query = query.filter(Accessory.brand == brand)
        if type:
            query = query.filter(Accessory.type == type)
        if min_price:
            query = query.filter(Accessory.price >= min_price)
        if max_price:
            query = query.filter(Accessory.price <= max_price)
        return query.all()

    def search_accessories(self, search_term):
        search_term = f"%{search_term}%"
        return self.session.query(Accessory).filter(
            Accessory.name.like(search_term) |
            Accessory.description.like(search_term) |
            Accessory.brand.like(search_term) |
            Accessory.type.like(search_term)
        ).all()
